first_impression: Veyl Witnessmere presents as someone shaped by the duties of a local fixer and the daily pressures of Witness Coil.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a local fixer, and proof that strangers will not make Witness Coil harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Veyl Witnessmere refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.

how_they_can_help: Can get difficult things done through informal channels.
